name.en: Ars Magna of Unification and Separation
name.ja: <ruby>結<rt>けつ</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt>ごう</rt></ruby>と<ruby>乖<rt>かい</rt></ruby><ruby>離<rt>り</rt></ruby>のアルス＝マグナ

text.en: You can banish this card from your hand; Special Summon 1 non-Spellcaster "Ars Magna" monster from your GY or banishment, also your "Power Patron" Link Monsters can make up to 3 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase this turn. If a Synchro and/or Link Monster(s) is Special Summoned while this card is banished: You can Special Summon this card. You can banish 1 "Ars Magna" card from your GY; draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Ars Magna of Unification and Separation" once per turn.
